title: Why does Tazieff risk his life like this?

meanings.usage: 指从事科学研究的人，可数名词
指一个人的整个生命时间
常用于描述正在运作的事物
指仔细观察并研究某事物
不及物动词，用于描述火山爆发
形容力量强大、破坏性的事物
可数名词，口语中常简称为 photo
指液态物质，与 solid（固体）和 gas（气体）相对
指从危险或困境中逃离
指用工具测量温度、大小等
指冷热程度，常与 measure 搭配使用
指从四面八方围住某物

examples.en: He has often risked his life in this way.
examples.zh: 他经常以这种方式冒着生命危险。

examples.en: Tazieff was able to set up his camp very close to the volcano.
examples.zh: 塔齐耶夫得以在离火山很近的地方搭建营地。

examples.en: Tazieff managed to escape just in time.
examples.zh: 塔齐耶夫设法及时逃脱了。

examples.en: He was able to return two days later.
He waited until the volcano became quiet.
Tazieff has often risked his life in this way.
examples.zh: 塔齐耶夫经常以这种方式冒着生命危险。

examples.en: A river of liquid rock was coming towards him.
He has been able to tell us more about active volcanoes than any man alive.
examples.zh: 他告诉我们的关于活火山的情况比任何在世的人都多。

examples.en: He managed to take a number of brilliant photographs.
examples.zh: 他设法拍摄了一些精彩的照片。

examples.en: He managed to climb into the mouth of Kituro.
examples.zh: 他设法爬进了基图罗火山口。

grammar.title: 一般过去时 (Simple Past Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示过去发生的动作或存在的状态，通常与表示过去的时间状语连用
grammar.usage: 用于叙述过去发生的事情，描述已经完成的动作或状态

examples.en: In 1948, he went to Lake Kivu in the Congo.

examples.zh: 后来他将其命名为基图罗。

grammar.title: 过去进行时 (Past Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示过去某个时刻正在进行的动作
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去正在发生的动作，常与 when/while 等连用

examples.en: A river of liquid rock was coming towards him.

grammar.title: 过去完成时 (Past Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示过去某一时间之前已经完成的动作，即'过去的过去'
grammar.structure: 主语 + had + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 用于描述在过去的某个动作之前已经完成的动作

examples.en: He noticed that a river of liquid rock was coming towards him, but he had already taken many photos.
examples.zh: 他注意到熔岩正向他涌来，但他已经拍了很多照片。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + has spent + 时间/精力 + doing something

original.en: Haroun Tazieff has spent his lifetime studying active volcanoes.
original.zh: 哈伦·塔齐耶夫一生都在研究活火山。

imitations.en: She has spent her life teaching students.
He has spent ten years writing this novel.
imitations.zh: 他花了十年写这本小说。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + was/were + able to + 动词原形

original.en: Tazieff was able to set up his camp very close to the volcano.
original.zh: 塔齐耶夫得以在离火山很近的地方搭建营地。

imitations.en: I was able to finish the work on time.
She was able to speak three languages.

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + managed to + 动词原形

original.en: Tazieff managed to escape just in time.
original.zh: 塔齐耶夫设法及时逃脱了。

imitations.en: He managed to pass the exam.
We managed to find the way home.
imitations.zh: 我们设法找到了回家的路。

sentencePatterns.pattern: It threatened to + 动词原形

original.en: It threatened to surround him completely.
original.zh: 它（熔岩）威胁要将他完全包围。

imitations.en: The rain threatened to ruin our picnic.
imitations.zh: 雨可能会毁掉我们的野餐。

imitations.en: The storm threatened to destroy the town.
imitations.zh: 暴风雨可能会摧毁这个城镇。
